pool.name: Invesco QQQ Trust
pool.binary_outcome: Right: 15-20% upside to new highs. Wrong: 10-15% downside if earnings disappoint
pool.thesis: Tech earnings momentum with NVDA driving 22.8% growth in Mag 7. VIX compression from 30 to 17 signals renewed risk appetite. QQQ at $648 vs $650 ATH.

evaluations.signal_reason: QQQ holding above $620 support with NVIDIA breaking to new highs driving tech rally. VIX compressed to 19.03 confirms risk-on sentiment.
evaluations.summary: <cite index="6-1,9-5">QQQ trading at $661.24, down -0.40% today but holding well above the $620 invalidation level.</cite> <cite index="13-2,13-24">NVIDIA stock rose 5% on April 24 pushing market cap to $5.09 trillion, approaching all-time highs at $209 per share.</cite> <cite index="25-3,22-3">VIX compressed from previous highs to 19.03, supporting the thesis of renewed risk appetite.</cite>
evaluations.updated_bear_case: <cite index="13-9,13-17">NVIDIA dramatically underperformed other semiconductors YTD at only 7% vs Marvell 95%, as investors diversify away from single dominant names into broader AI infrastructure plays.</cite>
